title: New Strolid Social Teasers (Built From Your Exact Capabilities)
summary: This document outlines new social media teasers for Strolid, focusing on its core capabilities such as auto-summarized conversations, a fast dialer, instant lead assignment, unified communication channels, real-time hot prospect alerts, and efficient AI solutions for automotive dealers. The teasers emphasize speed, clarity, and operational efficiency to help dealers win more deals.
text:
🔥 
New Strolid Social Teasers (Built From Your Exact Capabilities)
Fast, bold, operationally grounded, and dealer-focused.

⭐ 1. 
On Notes & Conversation Summaries
1️⃣
“Most dealers rely on notes.
We rely on conversations.”
2️⃣
“Your CRM only shows what someone typed.
Strolid shows you what the customer actually said.”
“We don’t ask agents to write notes.
We auto-summarize every conversation — clean, consistent, and in the customer profile.”

⭐ 2. 
On Why You Call Faster (Dialer Advantage)
4️⃣
“Speed wins deals.
Our dialer makes us the fastest BDC in automotive — period.”
5️⃣
“We call faster than anyone because our tech doesn’t wait.
Why should your customers?”
6️⃣
“Every minute matters. Our dialer removes the minutes.”

⭐ 3. 
On Faster Response (Lead Assignment Rules)
7️⃣
“Your leads don’t sit in a queue.
They route instantly to the right person — every time.”
8️⃣
“No more ‘Who’s working this lead?’
We built assignment rules that eliminate the guessing — and the delays.”
9️⃣
“Fast response isn’t luck.
It’s process. And we’ve engineered it.”

⭐ 4. 
On Unifying All Communication Channels
🔟
“Calls, texts, emails, chats — all in one place, finally.”
“Your team and ours now see the same customer messages.
No gaps. No silos. No lost conversations.”
1️⃣2️⃣
“Every conversation your dealership has — unified, searchable, and trackable.”
“You can’t manage what you can’t see.
That’s why we capture everything.”

⭐ 5. 
On Real-Time Hot Prospect Alerts
1️⃣4️⃣
“Your hottest prospects shouldn’t wait for a report.
We send them to you as they happen.”
1️⃣5️⃣
“Opportunities don’t slip through the cracks when you’re updated in real time.”
“We notify your team the moment a customer shows intent — not tomorrow.”

⭐ 6. 
On Efficient AI (Without Dealers Paying for Massive AI Spend)
1️⃣7️⃣
“You don’t need to spend millions on AI.
We’ve already done the hard part.”
“We’ve built the efficiencies — without the excessive AI bill everyone else is trying to sell you.”
1️⃣9️⃣
“You get the power of AI without the ‘AI tax.’
We engineered it so you don’t have to.”
2️⃣0️⃣
“The industry is pitching hyper-scale AI.
Dealers don’t need hyper-scale — they need results.
We deliver those today.”

⭐ 7. 
On Your LLM Chat With Operational Data


⭐ 8. 
Blended “Punchline” Posts (Feel like trailers)
2️⃣5️⃣
“We call faster.
We respond faster.
We capture everything.
We connect every channel.
And we send you your hottest prospects instantly.
That’s why dealers choose Strolid.”
2️⃣6️⃣
“The difference between Strolid and everyone else?
We don’t guess.
We see — every call, text, email, and chat.”
2️⃣7️⃣
“Most vendors give you software.
We give you clarity.”
2️⃣8️⃣
“Other companies talk about AI.
We actually use it to fix the things that cost you money.”
2️⃣1️⃣FUTURE MESSAGING- 
“Our chat isn’t a widget.
It’s an LLM connected to your dealership’s real operational data.”
“Payments? Inventory? Trade ranges? Customer history? Process questions?
Ask our chat — it actually knows your store.”
2️⃣3️⃣
“Imagine a chat that can answer the questions your team struggles with.
That’s what we built.”
“This isn’t ChatGPT on your website.
This is your dealership’s brain — and it answers anything.”
